positive: A whimsical, playful cartoon illustration of a friendly sloth wearing tiny reading glasses and sipping tea in a hammock strung between two jungle vines. The style should be soft, kawaii, and inviting, using pastel colors and thick outlines, designed for maximum cuteness and print appeal.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, dark, realistic, distressed
